changeSet.author: travel-insurance
changeSet.comment: Drop single-column UNIQUE constraint on calculation_config.config_key. It prevents adding versioned (temporal) entries for the same key. Part of refactoring plan p. 5.3.

changeSet.author: travel-insurance
changeSet.comment: Add composite UNIQUE constraint on (config_key, valid_from). Aligns calculation_config with the temporal validity pattern used throughout the project (countries, age_coefficients, etc.).

changeSet.author: travel-insurance
changeSet.comment: Update table comment to reflect the fixed temporal unique constraint
changeSet.sql:
COMMENT ON TABLE calculation_config IS 'Global configuration for premium calculation behaviour.
UNIQUE CONSTRAINT fixed (refactoring plan p. 5.3): Changed from UNIQUE(config_key) to UNIQUE(config_key, valid_from). Allows versioned (temporal) entries for the same key.
EXAMPLE: AGE_COEFFICIENT_ENABLED = true from 2025-01-01 to 2025-12-31 AGE_COEFFICIENT_ENABLED = false from 2026-01-01 (open-ended)
KEYS: AGE_COEFFICIENT_ENABLED controls age-based coefficient (true/false). true means coefficient from age_coefficients table is applied. false means AgeCoefficient = 1.0 (no age adjustment).';
